articles.title: Prime Day deals are live: Shop today's best tech sales from Apple, Sony, Bose, Anker and others - Yahoo Tech
articles.description: Prime Day deals have discounted a bunch of our favorite tech from headphones to TVs to iPhone accessories and more.
articles.content: Amazon Prime Day is halfway over, but Prime members can still save across a swath of items available from the online retailer. The summertime shopping event typically runs for 48-hours, but Amazon ex… [+20800 chars]

articles.title: Microsoft adds another year to Windows 10 extended update program - Ars Technica
articles.description: About a quarter of PCs are still running Microsoft's previous operating system.

articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Google Finance gets a dedicated app for Android - TechCrunch
articles.description: Users will be able to access their watchlists, real-time market data, live financial news, and Google's AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, which explains why stocks moved.
articles.content: Google on Thursday launched a dedicated mobile app for Google Finance that houses users’ watchlists and provides real-time market data, live financial news, and Google’s AI-powered “Key Moments” feat… [+1987 chars]
